originalTitle: Live RL dev on PufferLib with Joseph Suarez
title: Refactoring PufferLib Training Backend to C-Style CUDA
summary: Worked on refactoring PufferLib's training backend from C++ classes to simpler C-style CUDA code to reduce bloat and improve maintainability. Encountered issues with LLM-generated code that introduced bugs and performance regressions, resulting in partial progress and a planned revert.
